mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM submission s WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.submit_time >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d') AND s.submit_time < DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT CASE WHEN s.score BETWEEN 0 AND 10 THEN '0-10' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN '11-20' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN '21-30' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN '31-40' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN '41-50' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 51 AND 60 THEN '51-60' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 61 AND 70 THEN '61-70' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 71 AND 80 THEN '71-80' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 81 AND 90 THEN '81-90' WHEN s.score BETWEEN 91 AND 100 THEN '91-100' END AS `range`, COUNT(*) AS count FROM submission s WHERE s.problem_id = #{problemId} AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.status = 'Finished' AND s.score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY `range` HAVING `range` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY MIN(s.score)

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM submission s WHERE s.problem_id = #{problemId} AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.submit_time >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
